mapper.select: SELECT a.*,b.`name` FROM app_video as a JOIN app_user AS b ON a.user_id = b.id WHERE datediff(now(),a.creat_time)<30 order by a.creat_time
select count(*) from app_video where datediff(now(),creat_time) <30
SELECT a.*,b.`name` FROM app_video as a JOIN app_user AS b ON a.user_id = b.id WHERE datediff(now(),a.creat_time)<30 order by day(a.creat_time)
SELECT * FROM app_video WHERE accident_id = #{id} AND source = #{source}
